meaning: n.[希神] 得墨忒耳(掌农业,结婚,丰饶之女神)
examples: In this way, Demeter traveled the world on every corner.
That is why in spring and summer when Demeter is happy, the sun shines.
Demeter quit his bank job two months ago and has launched a company, Demiforce, to develop more electronic games.
Made from Demeter Certified biodynamically farmed fruit (which is a whole lotta work), the vineyard rests near the junction of Dry Creek and Wine Creek.
